headline: Chevron Governance Questions In Venezuela Add A New Risk Consideration
summary: Chevron's joint venture partner Suelopetrol has raised public concerns about the transparency and legality of Chevron's plan to increase its ownership in a key Venezuelan oil project. The questions focus on corporate governance, disclosure, and how any ownership changes align with local regulations. The situation draws attention to Chevron's approach to partnerships and regulatory engagement in Venezuela at a time when the company is looking to expand activity in the country. For investors...

headline: Why Strait of Hormuz disruption is more severe for global LNG markets than for oil
summary: Investing.com -- Global Liquefied Natural Gas (LNG) markets are bracing for a period of sustained price elevation throughout 2026 as the ongoing closure of the Strait of Hormuz continues to throttle supply.

headline: Chevron CEO says Venezuela must do more for oil industry revival
summary: (Bloomberg) -- Chevron Corp.
